task_completion.description: Navigate to the CRF creation or management page in OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenClinica interface in Firefox with the 'Create CRF' or 'Manage CRFs' page open.

task_completion.description: Select the specified Excel template for upload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a file upload dialog or input field populated with the path '/home/ga/sample_crf.xls'.

task_completion.description: Preview the uploaded CRF template details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a preview or validation screen in OpenClinica displaying the CRF name 'Vital Signs' and listing items from the template (e.g., systolic_bp, heart_rate).

task_completion.description: Commit or save the CRF to the database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the agent clicking a 'Save', 'Commit', or 'Continue' button to finalize the creation of the CRF after uploading.

task_completion.description: Verify the CRF is saved to the database with at least one version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a success message confirming the CRF creation, or the 'Vital Signs' CRF appearing in the system's CRF list with an associated version number.

integrity.description: The agent used the Firefox web browser to interact with OpenClinica.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser window with the OpenClinica web interface, rather than terminal commands (like curl) interacting with the API.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the provided template rather than manually creating the CRF items one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file upload input explicitly shows 'sample_crf.xls' being used in the OpenClinica UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or CRF list.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open and actively modifying the DOM to display 'Vital Signs'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected CRF name is exactly 'Vital Signs'. The uploaded template from '/home/ga/sample_crf.xls' contains exactly 7 items (systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, heart_rate, temperature, resp_rate, weight, height). During the preview or confirmation steps, look for these specific item names to verify the correct template was processed.
